---
title: 'Candy Cane Earings'
date: '2012-06-11T07:07:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3014838100931451223'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/candy-cane-earings.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Jewelry'
  - 'Christmas'
---

<br />
<div style="text-align: left;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/" style="text-align: -webkit-auto;" target="">Home</a></div>
<br />
<br />
<h3 style="text-align: center;">

Candy Cane Earings</h3>
<h4 style="text-align: center;">






Candy Canes do grow on trees!!!!</h4>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0632-4a6d5165e21d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0632-74e21987badc.jpg" height="480" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0664-915da68138c2.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0664-2517643a163b.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0660-e19c335be54a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0660-ff952014f080.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0662-743d14fe65b4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0662-8f22608e408f.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0659-df0004b98418.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0659-52b815537e6c.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0666-25340a5dc8f6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0666-54b99b010802.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0671-846a66782246.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0671-692daba0e4f6.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0669-b80b2cdf031d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0669-c90acf09c8de.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a>&nbsp;<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0672-96a4e4d29be7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0672-1831c0885d0e.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0694-3805e63ae44b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0694-cc45c2cfcc52.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0718-afe3b1b92559.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0718-e947c594195c.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a>&nbsp;<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0717-2a367c67cb9c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0717-11e934e102f6.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0708-9dda5ad5f9fa.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0708-bf0fc023ae8d.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0692-8be41ec501f5.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0692-6edd97be224f.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0698-70f6f96ab05a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0698-65080bc7952e.jpg" height="200" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0713-a58f1a0133f5.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0713-106329431bbf.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0733-aa4045365642.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0733-fc888b964ebf.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a></div>
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0724-4c33b31e9073.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0724-2bf692985f34.jpg" height="150" width="200" />&nbsp; &nbsp;</a><br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0721-eed7fa2368cd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0721-fc95c693bb43.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a><br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0727-b96b4bb557d3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0727-329acaa795fc.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a><br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0729-00bdf3196be7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0729-ba02091951ed.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0736-8e199e52d760.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0736-f54a9df37b23.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0739-9be4f45af686.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0739-6aba43ef0780.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0744-5dd218487826.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0744-9045bd70b728.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0743-9715d263a122.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0743-5282ee208872.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0746-b8553e9f156e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0746-ccb9b6cae90d.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0745-7f89d61db9c8.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0745-2ce4a7aabae6.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0634-4ce73b49737a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0634-cb420d7fcaad.jpg" height="480" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/2012/06/tc-jewelry.html" style="text-align: center;">Back to TC&amp;C Jewelry</a><br />
<br />
<br />
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!<br />
<br />
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br />
<br />
Flavia Wolfe<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe>
